title: Broadcom Host
description: A Host represents a physical ESXi server that provides compute, memory, storage, and networking resources to virtual machines within a vSphere or VCF environment.

id.description: The unique identifier of the host.

name.description: The hostname or display name of the host.

fqdn.description: The fully qualified domain name of the host.

connection_state.description: The connection state of the host.

power_state.description: The power state of the host.

cluster.description: The identifier of the cluster to which this host belongs.

cpu.description: CPU resource information for the host.

cores.description: The total number of CPU cores.

memory.description: Memory resource information for the host.

version.description: The ESXi version running on the host.

status.description: The commissioning status of the host in VCF.

type.description: The type of network associated with this IP.

ip_addresses.description: Network addresses assigned to the host.
